tasks.label: Git Push
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'v10: dashboard filter, display fix, category updates' && git push origin main

tasks.label: Git Push v10
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit -m 'v10: dashboard filter, display fix, category updates'; git push origin main

tasks.label: Check Android
tasks.command: emulator -list-avds 2>&1; Write-Host '---'; where.exe emulator 2>&1; Write-Host '---'; where.exe adb 2>&1

tasks.label: Find Android SDK
tasks.command: $paths = @('C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk', 'C:\Android', 'C:\Program Files\Android', 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Android'); foreach($p in $paths) { if(Test-Path $p) { Write-Host "FOUND: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -Filter 'emulator.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName } else { Write-Host "NOT FOUND: $p" } }

tasks.label: Check SDK Details
tasks.command: $sdk = 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk'; Get-ChildItem $sdk -Directory | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.Name }; Write-Host '---EMULATOR---'; $emu = Join-Path $sdk 'emulator\emulator.exe'; if(Test-Path $emu) { Write-Host "Found: $emu"; & $emu -list-avds 2>&1 } else { Write-Host 'emulator.exe not found' }; Write-Host '---ADB---'; $adb = Join-Path $sdk 'platform-tools\adb.exe'; if(Test-Path $adb) { Write-Host "Found: $adb" } else { Write-Host 'adb not found' }

tasks.label: HTTP Server
tasks.command: python -m http.server 8080 --directory 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses'

tasks.label: HTTP Server Node
tasks.command: npx -y http-server 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses' -p 8080 -c-1

tasks.label: Android Emulator
tasks.command: & 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\emulator\emulator.exe' -avd Medium_Phone_API_35 -no-snapshot-load

tasks.label: Open in Emulator Browser
tasks.command: $adb = 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; Write-Host 'Waiting for emulator to boot...'; & $adb wait-for-device; Write-Host 'Device connected, waiting for boot animation to end...'; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $bootanim = & $adb shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>&1 } while ($bootanim -ne '1'); Write-Host 'Boot complete! Opening browser...'; & $adb shell am start -a android.intent.action.VIEW -d 'http://10.0.2.2:8080/home_expense.htm'; Write-Host 'DONE - Browser opened on emulator!'

tasks.label: Check Build Tools
tasks.command: Write-Host '=== JAVA ==='; java -version 2>&1; Write-Host '=== JAVAC ==='; javac -version 2>&1; Write-Host '=== GRADLE ==='; gradle --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5; Write-Host '=== SDK CONTENTS ==='; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\build-tools' | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.Name }; Write-Host '=== PLATFORMS ==='; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platforms' | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.Name }; Write-Host '=== CMDLINE-TOOLS ==='; Test-Path 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools'

tasks.label: Find Java
tasks.command: $paths = @('C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio', 'C:\Program Files\Android Studio', 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Android\Android Studio'); foreach($p in $paths) { if(Test-Path $p) { Write-Host "FOUND: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p -Directory | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $($_.Name)" } } }; Write-Host '=== JBR ==='; $jbrPath = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\Android' -Recurse -Filter 'java.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName; $jbrPath; Write-Host '=== JAVA_HOME ==='; Write-Host $env:JAVA_HOME; Write-Host '=== ENV Paths with java ==='; $env:Path -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'java|jdk|jbr|jre' }

tasks.label: Copy Assets
tasks.command: Copy-Item 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\home_expense.htm' 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\src\main\assets\home_expense.htm'; Write-Host 'HTML copied to assets'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\src\main\res\mipmap-hdpi' -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\src\main\res\mipmap-mdpi' -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\src\main\res\mipmap-xhdpi' -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\src\main\res\mipmap-xxhdpi' -Force | Out-Null; Write-Host 'Directories created'

tasks.label: Copy Assets 2
tasks.command: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\src\main\assets' -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\home_expense.htm' 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\src\main\assets\home_expense.htm' -Force; Write-Host 'HTML copied to assets OK'

tasks.label: Find Gradle Wrapper
tasks.command: $env:JAVA_HOME = 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr'; $env:ANDROID_HOME = 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk'; Set-Location 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app'; Write-Host 'Checking Gradle in Android Studio...'; $gradlePath = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\plugins\gradle' -Recurse -Filter 'gradle.bat' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if($gradlePath) { Write-Host "Found gradle: $gradlePath" } else { Write-Host 'No gradle.bat found in AS plugins, trying lib...'; $gradlePath = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\lib' -Recurse -Filter 'gradle*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName; $gradlePath }; Write-Host '--- Checking gradle wrapper jar in AS ---'; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio' -Recurse -Filter 'gradle-wrapper.jar' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: Download Gradle Wrapper
tasks.command: Write-Host 'Downloading gradle-wrapper.jar...'; $wrapperUrl = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gradle/gradle/v8.2.0/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar'; $outPath = 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\gradle\wrapper\gradle-wrapper.jar'; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $wrapperUrl -OutFile $outPath -UseBasicParsing; if(Test-Path $outPath) { Write-Host "Downloaded OK: $((Get-Item $outPath).Length) bytes" } else { Write-Host 'FAIL' }

tasks.label: Build APK
tasks.command: $env:JAVA_HOME = 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr'; $env:ANDROID_HOME = 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk'; Set-Location 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app'; Write-Host 'Starting Gradle build...'; cmd /c 'set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr& set ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk& gradlew.bat assembleDebug --no-daemon 2>&1'; Write-Host '=== BUILD FINISHED ==='

tasks.label: Build APK v2
tasks.command: cmd /c 'cd /d c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app & set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr& set ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk& gradlew.bat assembleDebug --no-daemon 2>&1'

tasks.label: Build APK v3
tasks.command: Remove-Item 'C:\Users\localad\.gradle\caches\transforms-3' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Gradle transform cache cleared'; cmd /c 'cd /d c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app & set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr& set ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk& gradlew.bat clean assembleDebug --no-daemon 2>&1'

tasks.label: Build APK v4
tasks.command: Remove-Item 'C:\Users\localad\.gradle\caches\transforms-3' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\.gradle' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\build' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Caches cleared'; cmd /c 'cd /d c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app & set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr& set ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk& gradlew.bat assembleDebug --no-daemon 2>&1'

tasks.label: Test jlink
tasks.command: Write-Host '=== jlink test ==='; & 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr\bin\jlink.exe' --version 2>&1; Write-Host '=== java version ==='; & 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr\bin\java.exe' -version 2>&1; Write-Host '=== JBR modules ==='; & 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr\bin\java.exe' --list-modules 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5

tasks.label: Build APK v5
tasks.command: Remove-Item 'C:\Users\localad\.gradle\caches\transforms-3' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\.gradle' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\build' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\build' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Caches cleared'; cmd /c 'cd /d c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app & set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr& set ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk& gradlew.bat assembleDebug --no-daemon --info 2>&1'

tasks.label: Install & Launch
tasks.command: $adb = 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; $apk = 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk'; Write-Host "APK path: $apk"; Write-Host "APK exists: $(Test-Path $apk)"; if(Test-Path $apk) { Write-Host "APK size: $((Get-Item $apk).Length / 1KB) KB" }; Write-Host 'Checking emulator...'; $devices = & $adb devices 2>&1; Write-Host $devices; Write-Host 'Installing APK...'; & $adb install -r $apk 2>&1; Write-Host 'Launching app...'; & $adb shell am start -n com.homestay.expense/.MainActivity 2>&1; Write-Host 'DONE!'

tasks.label: Start Emulator
tasks.command: & 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\emulator\emulator.exe' -avd Medium_Phone_API_35

tasks.label: Install APK
tasks.command: $adb = 'C:\Users\localad\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; $apk = 'c:\Users\localad\Desktop\homestay-expenses\android-app\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk'; Write-Host 'Waiting for emulator...'; & $adb wait-for-device; Write-Host 'Device connected! Waiting for boot...'; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $boot = & $adb shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>&1 } while ($boot -ne '1'); Write-Host 'Boot complete!'; Write-Host 'Installing APK...'; & $adb install -r $apk 2>&1; Write-Host 'Launching app...'; & $adb shell am start -n com.homestay.expense/.MainActivity 2>&1; Write-Host 'ALL DONE!'
